title: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 1 - Polar Bears on Thinner Ice
rawPassageText:
READING PASSAGE 1
You should spend about 20 minutes on Questions 1-13, which are based on Reading Passage 1 below.

Polar Bears on Thinner Ice

A

The polar bear is often presented as a simple symbol of the Arctic, but its life is more specialised than many people realise. Although it is classed as a marine mammal, it breathes air, gives birth on land or snow, and spends much of its hunting life on sea ice. Its fur is not actually white; hollow transparent hairs scatter light, creating the pale appearance that helps the animal blend into its surroundings. Beneath the fur, black skin absorbs warmth from the sun. These adaptations suit an environment where cold is constant but food is unevenly distributed.

B

Polar bears feed mainly on seals, especially ringed and bearded seals. The bears use sea ice as a platform from which they wait near breathing holes or break into snow-covered birth lairs. This method requires patience rather than speed. On land, polar bears can eat birds' eggs, vegetation or carcasses, but these foods usually cannot provide the same energy as seal blubber. A bear may look powerful walking along a beach, yet the animal's most important hunting ground is the frozen surface of the ocean.

C

The main pressure on polar bears is the loss of sea ice. In several Arctic regions, spring ice is breaking up earlier and autumn ice is forming later, shortening the period when bears can hunt seals effectively. Longer ice-free seasons force some bears to spend more time fasting on land. This is especially difficult for females with cubs, because they need enough fat reserves to nurse their young after leaving maternity dens. Scientists do not expect every polar bear population to change at the same speed, but the general direction of the risk is clear.

D

Human communities in the Arctic face a related problem. When bears spend more time near settlements, encounters with people can increase. Some towns use patrols, warning systems and secure food storage to reduce danger for both residents and bears. These local actions can prevent individual animals from being shot after entering communities. However, they do not solve the larger problem of a warming Arctic. Conservation therefore has to work at two levels: reducing immediate conflict and addressing the climate forces that are altering the bears' habitat.

E

Researchers study polar bears through satellite collars, aerial surveys, genetic sampling and observations from local hunters. Each method has limits. Collars are usually fitted to adult females because the necks of adult males are too wide for many collar designs. Aerial surveys can cover large areas, but bad weather may interrupt flights. Indigenous knowledge is also important because people who travel regularly on sea ice may notice changes in bear behaviour before they appear in formal datasets. Combining these sources gives a fuller picture than any single method can provide.

F

Protecting polar bears is sometimes imagined as moving animals to safer places or feeding them when ice is scarce. Such measures may help in emergencies, but they are unlikely to be a long-term answer for a species shaped by sea ice. More durable protection includes cutting greenhouse-gas emissions, limiting industrial disturbance in sensitive areas, and maintaining corridors between seasonal habitats. The polar bear's future will depend not only on wildlife management, but also on choices made far from the Arctic about energy, transport and consumption.

Questions 1-6

Do the following statements agree with the claims of the writer in Reading Passage 1?

In boxes 1-6 on your answer sheet, write

YES if the statement agrees with the claims of the writer
NO if the statement contradicts the claims of the writer
NOT GIVEN if it is impossible to say what the writer thinks about this

1 Polar bears depend on sea ice for much of their hunting life.
2 The passage says that polar bear fur is naturally white because it contains white pigment.
3 Climate change can reduce the time available for polar bears to hunt seals.
4 Adult male polar bears teach cubs the safest routes across sea ice.
5 Local safety measures can reduce the chance that bears entering settlements will be killed.
6 Moving polar bears to safer places is presented as the best long-term solution.

Questions 7-13

Complete the summary below.

Choose ONE WORD ONLY from the passage for each answer.

Write your answers in boxes 7-13 on your answer sheet.

Polar bears and conservation

Last longer, and forced onto land 9....................
rawAnswerKey:
Question 1: Polar bears depend on sea ice for much of their hunting life.

Correct Answer: YES

Accepted Answers: YES

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 1 - Polar Bears on Thinner Ice

Exact Portion: spends much of its hunting life on sea ice

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ YES เพราะโจทย์บอกว่า polar bears depend on sea ice for much of their hunting life ซึ่งตรงกับ passage ที่ระบุว่า polar bear spends much of its hunting life on sea ice คำว่า depend on ในโจทย์สรุปจากการที่ sea ice เป็นพื้นที่หลักในการล่า ส่วน much of their hunting life ตรงกับวลีใน passage แทบตรงตัว ดังนั้น statement นี้เห็นด้วยกับ claim ของผู้เขียน

Paraphrased Vocabulary: depend on sea ice = spends much of its hunting life on sea ice; hunting life = hunting life; polar bears = the polar bear; answer signal = YES

Question 2: The passage says that polar bear fur is naturally white because it contains white pigment.

Correct Answer: NO

Accepted Answers: NO

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 1 - Polar Bears on Thinner Ice

Exact Portion: Its fur is not actually white; hollow transparent hairs scatter light, creating the pale appearance

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ NO เพราะโจทย์บอกว่า fur เป็นสีขาวตามธรรมชาติเนื่องจากมี white pigment แต่ passage พูดตรงกันข้ามว่า fur is not actually white และอธิบายว่า hollow transparent hairs scatter light จึงเกิด pale appearance Passage ไม่ได้บอกว่ามี pigment สีขาว แต่ปฏิเสธความขาวจริงของขนโดยตรง จึงต้องตอบ NO

Paraphrased Vocabulary: naturally white = actually white; contains white pigment = not stated and contradicted by transparent hairs; pale appearance = looks white; answer signal = NO

Question 3: Climate change can reduce the time available for polar bears to hunt seals.

Correct Answer: YES

Accepted Answers: YES

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 1 - Polar Bears on Thinner Ice

Exact Portion: spring ice is breaking up earlier and autumn ice is forming later, shortening the period when bears can hunt seals effectively.

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ YES เพราะโจทย์กล่าวว่า climate change ลดเวลาที่ polar bears ใช้ล่า seals ได้ ซึ่งตรงกับ passage ที่บอกว่า ice breaks up earlier และ forms later ทำให้ shortening the period when bears can hunt seals effectively แม้ passage ใช้คำว่า loss of sea ice มากกว่า climate change โดยตรง แต่บริบทคือ warming Arctic และ sea-ice loss ดังนั้นความหมายตรงกัน

Paraphrased Vocabulary: reduce the time available = shortening the period; hunt seals = hunt seals effectively; climate change = loss of sea ice / warming Arctic; answer signal = YES

Question 4: Adult male polar bears teach cubs the safest routes across sea ice.

Correct Answer: NOT GIVEN

Accepted Answers: NOT GIVEN

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 1 - Polar Bears on Thinner Ice

Exact Portion: females with cubs, because they need enough fat reserves to nurse their young after leaving maternity dens.

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ NOT GIVEN เพราะ passage กล่าวถึง females with cubs และการ nurse young หลังออกจาก maternity dens แต่ไม่ได้พูดว่า adult male polar bears สอน cubs หรือมี safest routes across sea ice ข้อมูลเรื่องตัวผู้สอนลูกและเส้นทางปลอดภัยเป็นรายละเอียดเฉพาะที่ไม่มีการยืนยันหรือปฏิเสธใน passage จึงตอบ NOT GIVEN

Paraphrased Vocabulary: adult male polar bears = not stated in this role; teach cubs = not stated; safest routes = not stated; answer signal = NOT GIVEN

Question 5: Local safety measures can reduce the chance that bears entering settlements will be killed.

Correct Answer: YES

Accepted Answers: YES

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 1 - Polar Bears on Thinner Ice

Exact Portion: Some towns use patrols, warning systems and secure food storage to reduce danger for both residents and bears. These local actions can prevent individual animals from being shot after entering communities.

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ YES เพราะโจทย์บอกว่า local safety measures ลดโอกาสที่ bears entering settlements จะถูกฆ่าได้ ซึ่งตรงกับ passage ที่บอกว่า towns use patrols, warning systems and secure food storage และ local actions can prevent individual animals from being shot after entering communities คำว่า killed ในโจทย์เทียบกับ being shot ใน passage ได้ชัดเจน

Paraphrased Vocabulary: local safety measures = patrols, warning systems and secure food storage; entering settlements = entering communities; killed = being shot; answer signal = YES

Question 6: Moving polar bears to safer places is presented as the best long-term solution.

Correct Answer: NO

Accepted Answers: NO

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 1 - Polar Bears on Thinner Ice

Exact Portion: moving animals to safer places or feeding them when ice is scarce. Such measures may help in emergencies, but they are unlikely to be a long-term answer

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ NO เพราะโจทย์บอกว่า moving polar bears to safer places เป็น best long-term solution แต่ passage บอกตรงข้ามว่า measures เช่น moving animals may help in emergencies แต่ unlikely to be a long-term answer ดังนั้น claim ของโจทย์ขัดกับ passage โดยตรง โดยเฉพาะ best long-term solution ขัดกับ unlikely to be a long-term answer

Paraphrased Vocabulary: moving polar bears to safer places = moving animals to safer places; best long-term solution = long-term answer; unlikely = contradicts best; answer signal = NO

Question 7: Do much of their hunting, and breathe air and give birth on land ....................
Correct Answer: ice

Accepted Answers: ice

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 1 - Polar Bears on Thinner Ice

Exact Portion: spends much of its hunting life on sea ice

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ ice เพราะ summary ใช้ถ้อยคำถอดความ ไม่ได้คัดลอกวลีจาก passage ตรงช่องว่าง — summary พูดถึงการล่าบนผิว frozen ____ บนท้องทะเล ซึ่งสรุปจาก passage ที่บอกว่า spends much of its hunting life on sea ice โจทย์ไม่ใช้คำว่า sea ice ตรง ๆ แต่ให้หา ONE WORD จากวลีนี้ จึงต้องเติม ice


Paraphrased Vocabulary: and give birth on land = spends much of its hunting life on sea ice; answer signal = ice

Question 8: Food they find ashore, and blubber supplies more energy ....................
Correct Answer: seals

Accepted Answers: seals

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 1 - Polar Bears on Thinner Ice

Exact Portion: Polar bears feed mainly on seals, especially ringed and bearded seals.

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ seals เพราะ summary ใช้ถ้อยคำถอดความ ไม่ได้คัดลอกวลีจาก passage ตรงช่องว่าง — summary ใช้ principal quarry และ blubber supplies more energy แทน feed mainly on seals โดยตรง แต่ passage ระบุชัดว่า feed mainly on seals และเปรียบเทียบพลังงานกับ seal blubber จึงต้องเติม seals


Paraphrased Vocabulary: and blubber supplies more energy = polar bears feed mainly on seals especially ringed and bearded; answer signal = seals

Question 9: Last longer, and forced onto land ....................
Correct Answer: fasting

Accepted Answers: fasting

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 1 - Polar Bears on Thinner Ice

Exact Portion: Longer ice-free seasons force some bears to spend more time fasting on land.

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ fasting เพราะ summary ใช้ถ้อยคำถอดความ ไม่ได้คัดลอกวลีจาก passage ตรงช่องว่าง — summary บอกว่า bears are forced onto land and spend more time ____ ซึ่งสอดคล้องกับ passage ที่ใช้ force some bears to spend more time fasting on land แม้โจทย์จะไม่ซ้ำวลี ice-free seasons ทุกคำ แต่ความหมายตรงกัน จึงเติม fasting


Paraphrased Vocabulary: longer and forced onto land = longer ice free seasons force some bears to spend more; answer signal = fasting

Question 10: Emerging from snow dens, and feed their young ....................
Correct Answer: cubs

Accepted Answers: cubs

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 1 - Polar Bears on Thinner Ice

Exact Portion: This is especially difficult for females with cubs, because they need enough fat reserves to nurse their young after leaving maternity dens.

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ cubs เพราะ summary ใช้ถ้อยคำถอดความ ไม่ได้คัดลอกวลีจาก passage ตรงช่องว่าง — summary ใช้ females emerging from snow dens และ feed their ____ แทน nurse their young after leaving maternity dens โดยตรง แต่ passage ระบุ females with cubs และ nurse their young จึงต้องเติม cubs


Paraphrased Vocabulary: dens and feed their young = this is especially difficult for females with cubs because they; answer signal = cubs

Question 11: Some settlements rely on patrols and controlled food .................... to limit bear clashes.
Correct Answer: storage

Accepted Answers: storage

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 1 - Polar Bears on Thinner Ice

Exact Portion: Some towns use patrols, warning systems and secure food storage to reduce danger for both residents and bears.

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ storage เพราะ summary ใช้ถ้อยคำถอดความ ไม่ได้คัดลอกวลีจาก passage ตรงช่องว่าง — summary ใช้ controlled food ____ แทน secure food storage โดยตรง แต่ passage ระบุชัดว่า secure food storage และ reduce danger ซึ่งสอดคล้องกับ reduce clashes with bears จึงเติม storage


Paraphrased Vocabulary: settlements = towns; controlled food = secure food; limit bear clashes = reduce danger; answer signal = storage

Question 12: Aerial counts and hunter reports, and tracking bands on females ....................
Correct Answer: sampling

Accepted Answers: sampling

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 1 - Polar Bears on Thinner Ice

Exact Portion: Researchers study polar bears through satellite collars, aerial surveys, genetic sampling and observations from local hunters.

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ sampling เพราะ summary ใช้ถ้อยคำถอดความ ไม่ได้คัดลอกวลีจาก passage ตรงช่องว่าง — summary ใช้ tracking bands และ inherited-trait work through laboratory ____ แทนการเขียน genetic sampling ตรง ๆ แต่ passage ระบุ genetic sampling เป็นหนึ่งในวิธี จึงต้องเติม sampling เป็นคำเดียวจากวลีนี้


Paraphrased Vocabulary: and tracking bands on females = researchers study polar bears through satellite collars aerial surveys genetic; answer signal = sampling

Question 13: Lasting safeguards depend on lowering greenhouse gases and preserving movement .................... across habitats that shift with the seasons.
Correct Answer: corridors

Accepted Answers: corridors

Answer Group: IELTS Academic Reading April 2026 Passage 1 - Polar Bears on Thinner Ice

Exact Portion: More durable protection includes cutting greenhouse-gas emissions, limiting industrial disturbance in sensitive areas, and maintaining corridors between seasonal habitats.

Short Thai Explanation: คำตอบคือ corridors เพราะ summary ใช้ถ้อยคำถอดความ ไม่ได้คัดลอกวลีจาก passage ตรงช่องว่าง — summary ใช้ lasting safeguards และ keeping open ____ between habitats used in different seasons ซึ่งสรุปจาก maintaining corridors between seasonal habitats โดยไม่ใส่คำว่า habitat ติดกับช่องว่าง จึงต้องเติม corridors


Paraphrased Vocabulary: lasting safeguards = more durable protection; preserving movement = maintaining corridors; shifting habitats = seasonal habitats; answer = corridors
